Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship for Health Departments 
Sept. 22, 2025 
At a glance 
State and local health department antibiotic stewardship programs play an important role in guiding antibiotic stewardship efforts in various healthcare settings and promoting appropriate antibiotic use for all patients in their communities. 
The Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship for Health Departments outline the structure of state and local health department stewardship programs, antibiotic stewardship implementation strategies, and re
